page-description: Learn about free software licenses and how to <explorer>choose the right one</explorer> for your project.
banner-text: New to open source? Start with our contribution guide.
footer-note: License data sourced from SPDX. Compliance tools provided by FOSSA.
empty-results: No licenses found matching your criteria. Try adjusting your filters.
project-count: {count, plural, =0 {No projects found} one {# project found} other {# projects found}}
contribution-status: {status, select, pending {Your contribution is pending review} approved {Your contribution has been approved} rejected {Your contribution needs revisions} other {Unknown status}}

nested.section-description: Explore more about open source licensing and compliance.

multi-link: Read the Open Source Definition, review the license chooser, and check SPDX identifiers.
markdown-description:
## Quick Reference

- **MIT**: Most permissive, minimal restrictions
- **Apache-2.0**: Permissive with patent grant
- **GPL-3.0**: Strong copyleft, derivatives must be GPL

For more details, see the [full comparison](/open-source/#comparison-table).
